summary: doctor recognizes composed auth as configured when ST_APP_KEY + ST_CLIENT_ID + ST_CLIENT_SECRET are all present, even before the bearer has been minted; also surfaces ST_TENANT_ID readiness.
reason: The generator's doctor only recognized a bearer token as 'configured', so fresh installs of a composed-auth CLI always reported 'unconfigured' until the first call minted a token (#1303 / inventory-retro anti-pattern). Tenant readiness is part of the same readiness check (#1332).
validated_outcome: doctor reports 'configured (composed: ST-App-Key + OAuth2 client_credentials; bearer minted on first call)' when env vars are set
